title: Bundle Coach / AI Bundle Builder

buildability.reason: The app can be built as a Shopify Admin API app with a swipe UI using App Bridge; 3 days can set up skeleton, 3 weeks can add AI copy and image stitching, 10 weeks can polish.

speedToRevenue.reason: The app can be listed in the Shopify App Store, offer a free trial, and charge merchants after the first bundle cycle.

wedge.reason: It auto‑generates bundle proposals from a store’s collections and order history, letting merchants quickly create upsell bundles.

distribution.reason: Targeting US beauty, supplements, and pet DTC brands with $200K–$1M revenue aligns with the $50K–$2M DTC market reachable via the App Store.

trapRisk.reason: No high‑risk features such as generative 3D, real‑time voice/video, autonomous repricing, or multi‑app scope are present.

expansion.reason: Future growth can add dynamic bundle suggestions, AI copy, image generation, analytics, and cross‑sell features to scale from €10K to €1M without pivot.

technicalSnapshot: The solution will be a Shopify App leveraging the Admin API to read collections and order data, the Storefront API for product images, and App Bridge for a swipe‑style UI. It will integrate with an AI service for copy generation and an image‑processing service for hero image stitching, and use Shopify Billing API for subscription management.

v1Plan.day3: Skeleton app with Admin API integration and basic UI to list collections.
v1Plan.week3: Add AI copy generation, image stitching, bundle logic, and swipe UI for merchant approval.
v1Plan.week10: Polish UI, add analytics, performance optimizations, and subscription billing.
